caption: The video features a man performing on stage, likely at a concert or event. He is wearing a white shirt with a distinctive red and black design on the chest and a black vest adorned with blue floral embroidery. The man has his hair tied back and is wearing glasses. He is playing an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone, which is positioned close to his mouth. The background consists of wooden blinds, suggesting an indoor venue. The audience is partially visible in the foreground, indicating that he is performing for a live crowd. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization. The man appears focused and engaged in his performance, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere.
